title: Feedback Loop System Architecture
description: An interactive Mermaid workflow showing the eight-stage feedback loop from user interaction through analysis, human review, corrective action, validation, and deployment.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.topic: Feedback loop architecture and continuous improvement
learningObjectives: Describe the eight stages of a chatbot feedback loop
Explain the role of validation before deployment
educational.prerequisites: Understanding of user feedback signals and databases

pedagogical.instructionalStrategy: Interactive workflow diagram with hover-to-reveal stage details
pedagogical.assessment: Students trace a feedback event through every stage and add a rollback stage
